hero.badge: Now shipping across Europe • 3-year warranty • B2B focused
hero.badgePreorder: Pre-orders open across Europe • 3-year warranty • B2B focused
hero.subtitle: High-performance appliances for European organizations. Fully private. No cloud. Built for B2B.

products.title: Choose your performance level

edge.name: Edge
edge.description: Compact desktop appliance for individuals and small teams. Excellent for 7B–13B models with high-speed local inference.

studio.name: Studio
studio.description: Powerful tower for teams. Handles up to 70B models, collaborative RAG, and production workloads with ease.

forge.name: Forge
forge.description: Enterprise-grade system for large organizations. Massive scale inference, fine-tuning, and multi-node ready.

products.blurb: All appliances include our private inference engine and come pre-loaded with leading open-source models.

why.privacyDesc: Nothing leaves your premises. Perfect for regulated industries and sensitive IP.
why.latencyDesc: Run inference at the edge or in your data center. No network round-trips to the cloud.
why.costsDesc: One-time hardware purchase. No surprise token bills or usage-based pricing.
why.controlDesc: Choose any open-source model, fine-tune freely, and integrate with your existing stack.

custom.title: Need a custom configuration?
custom.subtitle: Contact our team for tailored enterprise quotes and volume pricing.

footer.copyright: © {year} {brand} — Private generative AI infrastructure for Europe

canceledMessage: Your checkout was canceled. Your cart is still here — feel free to try again.

checkout.deliveryDifferentLabel: Delivery address is different from billing address
checkout.cardDesc: Secure payment powered by Stripe • 3D Secure
checkout.sepaDesc: Popular in Europe • No card needed
checkout.preorderNoticeBody: You pay a €{deposit} deposit today (credited toward your order). The remaining €{balance} will be charged when your appliance is ready to ship. Services billing starts at delivery.
checkout.preorderVatNote: Includes VAT at {rate}% (net deposit €{depositNet} + €{depositVat} VAT). Totals match what you pay today if VAT-inclusive billing is selected.
checkout.validation: Please fill in company name, email, address and city
checkout.validationDelivery: Please fill in the delivery address and city

success.invoice: Thank you, {company}! Your order has been registered. You will receive an invoice with payment instructions shortly.
success.sepa: SEPA Direct Debit has been set up for {company}. You will receive a confirmation email.
success.stripe: Payment successful via Stripe for {company}. You will receive order confirmation and tracking.

checkout.leaseDesc: Hardware amortized over {months} months + services included
checkout.firstMonthNote: First payment charged today via Stripe
checkout.invoiceRangeNote: (min €{min} – max €{max} — choose card or reduce order)
checkout.invoicePolicyNote: (Net 30 for hardware/upfront; pick card or SEPA below for recurring services)
checkout.recurringSepaDesc: For the monthly service charges (collected automatically)
checkout.vatInclusiveLabel: I wish to be billed VAT-inclusive
checkout.vatInclusiveExplanation: VAT will be charged by the supplier and added to the total. This election is only available when not prohibited by mandatory reverse charge or other legal rules.
checkout.vatInclusiveWarning: Selecting this will result in VAT at {rate}% being applied to the order (gross total charged).
checkout.viesInvalid: VAT number could not be verified via VIES
checkout.viesUnavailable: VIES verification is temporarily unavailable — try again shortly
checkout.viesStillChecking: Please wait for VAT verification to complete before continuing.

success.title: Thank you for your order!
success.message: Your payment has been processed successfully. You will receive a confirmation email with all the details and next steps for delivery and setup.
success.emailNote: You will also receive a confirmation email with tracking and setup instructions.

promotions.recurringPmRequired: A payment method is required for recurring services — billing starts after the promotional period.
promotions.recurringScheduleNote: Indicative monthly total. Promotional periods and standard rates are shown before payment; final terms appear on your order confirmation.
